'''Toryaz Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] near [[Ronay]] (a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]) used for lavish interplanetary negotiations and celebrations.

==Characteristics==
Its center was a two-kilometer-wide disc, 300 meters deep. The center contained hotels, shops, and gardens. From the disc were quarter-kilometer-long spokes, each which ended in luxury pods that were 40 meters thick and 250 meters across. Six were disc-shaped and six were triangular, with the variants alternating. Each pod could be self-sustaining if need be. One of the triangular pods was called the [[Narsacc Habitat]].

==History==
The station was run by a group of [[Kuati/Legends|Kuati]] merchant families, and did not offer single rooms. The cheapest sections available had a daily rent that was the same as the yearly earning of a middle-class family. It was protected by [[Toryaz Station Security]].

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Toryaz Station was chosen as a neutral site for negotiations between the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and a delegation from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to discuss Alliance withdrawal from [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] and allow both sides to save face and prevent an all-out war. [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] and [[Five World Prime Minister|Prime Minister]] [[Aidel Saxan]] were selected to represent the Alliance and Corellia, respectively. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] led a detachment of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to defend the negotiators.

After the first day of negotiations, [[Lumiya]] arrived disguised as a Kuati mercantile [[Prince/Legends|princess]] with a team of drugged [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] provided by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. Using her powers, she convinced [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Siron Tawaler]] to provide navigation details to the delegation's chambers, and then promptly disposed of Tawaler through an [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]]. The rabid commandos [[Attack on Toryaz Station|struck]] at each delegation, and succeeded in killing Prime Minister Saxan. The talks were a failure; Aidel Saxan's former husband [[Denjax Teppler]] stepped in to replace her; and the only clues to the mastermind behind it was a [[Lorrd Artifact|piece of cloth]] representing a variety of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-based cultures, including the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{Mo}}
